title: paraixeris sonchifolia var. serotina
intro: Paraixeris sonchifolia var. serotina, also known as Korean stonecrop or Korean creeping thyme, is a plant species belonging to the Rosaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is valued for its potential to treat various health issues such as digestive problems and skin conditions. The health benefits of Paraixeris sonchifolia var. serotina include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and promoting wound healing. It can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional Korean medicine to support overall health and well-being.
